title: muscarella tempestalis
side_effects: Muscarella tempestalis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues due to its potent alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea in some individuals. In extreme cases, improper use of Muscarella tempestalis has led to liver and kidney damage, as well as interactions with certain medications. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
